name: Almond Rice
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium-size saucepan, bring the rice and water to a boil.
2. Turn off heat and let rice stand in water, covered, for 6 hours.
3. When ready to cook, add bouillon granules and brine back to a boil.
4. Cook for 10 minutes until water is absorbed and rice is tender.
5. Drain if necessary.
6. Add almonds and lemon zest. Let stand a few minutes.
7. Fluff with a fork and serve.
Food Exchanges per serving: 1 STARCH/BREAD EXCHANGE
CAL: 96; CHO: 0mg; CAR: 19g; PRO: 2g; SOD: 123mg; FAT: 1g
